XingFuTang in Soho is famously known for their brown sugar milk teas and tapioca in London! Chewy and soft and made fresh frequently throughout the day ensures great quality every single time!! They have a huge variety of drinks ranging from matcha to milk teas to refreshing fruit teas! We got the brown sugar milk tea and it was creamy and delicious!  They are currently doing a Summer Lucky Capsule event untill 15th October where you can have the chance to win a prize with the purchase of any drink on Tuesdays and Wednesdays! Spin for prizes such as a mini bubble tea keychain, tote bag, or 50% OFF voucher. 🧋🎁 💖 @Xing Fu Tang UK #bubbletea #boba

CHAHALO🧋 London’s NEW must-try milk tea spot has arrived — say hello to Chahalo! Fresh from Taiwan, this gorgeous tea shop is serving fragrant brews, creamy frappes, and all-round boba bliss. 📍 Chahalo, Soho  #thefoodtrp #LondonBubbleTea #Chahalo #MilkTeaLovers #LondonFoodie

Finally tried the famous brown sugar bubble tea at Xing Fu Tang in Soho… and now I understand the hype. Freshly made pearls, perfectly caramelised brown sugar, and that creamy tea coming together in every sip — honestly so satisfying to watch and even better to drink. If you’re in Soho and love bubble tea, this one is definitely worth the visit. Highly recommend trying their signature drink at least once! Would you try this?  @Xing Fu Tang UK @XINGFUTANG - BUBBLE TEA  #ukfood #fyp #uktiktok #londoncafes #lifewithzain

Replying to @kirstythefoodie  This is part 2 of finding the best bubble tea in London, and we tried @heytea.uk @heyteauk in Soho! I was so surprised by this drink! First impressions - the queue was long, but the staff there were SO QUICK and super nice. I ordered their new Cloud Coconut Blue, made with coconut jelly, coconut water, coconut milk, blue spirulina liquid, and on top, they aded whipped matcha. For £5.50 GREAT PRICE! I am not a massive fan of Coconut, but it tasted so nice with the matcha! I wished it had tapioca instead of coconut jelly. Overall, I really enjoyed this drink! Where should I go next!?  Drop your recommendations in the comments! 🫶🏻 #bestbubbletealondon #bubbleteareview #londonfoodie #bobalovers #bubbletea

📍 Puffy, Soho. I wanted to check out this viral cookie shop and wow it exceeded expectations. There were so many flavours to pick from. We went for a Double Chocolate Hazelnut Cookie with Soft Serve Ice Cream and a Milk Chocolate Cookie. They were both absolutely delicious. It was more of a cakey consistency so the soft ice cream worked perfectly!! Go try the viral Puffy cookies asap!! #Puffy #viralcookie #Soho #london #londoneats

📍Onsu - 55A Dean St, W1D 6AG📍 📆Opening: 15th January  Onsu is a new Asian-Inspired bakery & patisserie located in Soho. They will be having a soft opening offer, where you can get 1 bread + 1 dessert + 1 coffee for only £4.90! ^(Only valid: 15th-17th, so be sure to get down there to get yours) I highly recommend trying the ⭐️Wagyu Beef Curry Bun⭐️, but there are so many unique flavours to try, so there will be something for everyone! @ONSU  #londonrestuarants #londonfood #londonhotspots #londonbakery #asianbakery

📍Onsu Bakery, Soho, London I ordered:  - the truffle toast: so tasty and flavourful 😍 -the salted egg yolk mille-feuille: so yum, very crispy pastry, a good balance between savoury and sweet - Ube latte: silky and creamy, love the rich purple colour 🪻 Would definitely go back again #londonbakery #onsubakery #londonhotspots #londonfoodguide Hong Kong style bakery London cafes in London cute cafe spots London cute London desserts London food places in London food eats

@ONSU  is a viral Soho spot specialising in artisanal Asian baking mixed with French pastry techniques. 🥐✨ What we ordered: 🍵 Matcha Tiramisu Latte. A velvety fusion where rich tiramisu flavour doesn't overpower the earthy matcha. 🍓 Strawberry Matcha Latte A vibrant, fruity layer of bold matcha over sweet, jammy strawberry purée. 🍰 Red Fruit Mille-feuille Delicate layers of shatteringly crisp pastry, silky cream, and tart berries. ☁️ Vanilla & Strawberry Cheesecake A cloud-like, mousse-soft vanilla cheesecake filled with juicy fresh strawberries. 📍Onsu. 55A Dean Street. Soho.  #soho #bakery #london #FoodTok #Foodie

This place has been on my list since it was first opened ~ @ONSU located in soho london  (Everything is halal and vegetarian) honestly the cakes are amazing and the staff are so helpful  #girlyaesthetic #londonspots #londondiaries #pinterestinspired #girlsgirl

The viral Dot Cakes are at C&D Soho this weekend and we couldn’t be more excited to share them with you all!  Vanilla cake sandwiched with vanilla Swiss meringue buttercream and raspberry compote, topped with more buttercream and sprinkles packaged in a perfect pastel little pot! They’re available this weekend until stocks last so get in there quick! #crumbsanddoilies #londonbakery #cakedecorating #dotcakes #dotcake

London's Filipino Bakery - Panadera I went to the Soho location twice in one week! @PanaderaBakery has absolutely perfected their recipes! Their sandos and baked goods were delicious! If I were to return and reorder, I would definitely get the Chicken Ceaser Sando and the Leche Flan Danish all over again! I will definitely be back to try the rest of their bakery! It all looked so good and I've heard the best things about them!
Alle Spots waren in Soho: B Bagel Bakery : Bagels - Tuna Melt & Hot Nola Chicken  Puffy Cookies #foodtest #Vlog #london #Lifestyle

Onsu Bakery in Soho, Central London 📍 55A Dean Street Asian-inspired halal bakery serving luxury patisserie with serious credentials behind it. Chef Getkwan has worked at The Dorchester and the three-Michelin-starred The Fat Duck. The Wagyu curry bun was rich and melt-in-the-mouth, wrapped in soft golden dough. The Minus 86°C ube might be one of the best in London. Cheesecake was unreal too. Luxury ingredients done properly. Jay Verified. #halal #soho #bakery #londonfood #wagyu  @ONSU
